parameters.name: startKey
parameters.description: Key for pagination, indicating where to start the list

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: keyword search for the users (could be name, or email)

parameters.name: factor.id
parameters.description:
for OTPs this will be a request_id, for email_password this
will be the email address

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to fetch

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user fetching the farmer

parameters.name: farmerId
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to be fetched

duration.title: This is the number of days which the subscription is valid for

secretValue.title: Value of the factor (e.g., password or OTP)

requestId.title: ID for the additional factor request"security_question"

factorHint.title: Hint for the additional factor (e.g., last 4 digits of phone number)

usersgrpcAdditionalFactor.description: Request and response messages for gRPC methods.

id.title:
for OTPs this will be a request_id, for email_password this
will be the email address

secretValue.title: Value of the factor (e.g., password or OTP)

factors.title: A list of authentication factors provided by the client

loginComplete.title:
Indicates if login is complete
Returned if an additional factor is required

tokens.title: Access and refresh tokens returned if login is complete

nextKey.title: Key for the next set of results (for pagination)

usersgrpcOtpIntent.title:
- OTP_INTENT_UNSPECIFIED: Default value if no intent is specified
 - OTP_INTENT_LOGIN: OTP for login
 - OTP_INTENT_RESET_PASSWORD: OTP for resetting password
 - OTP_INTENT_SIGNUP: OTP for signing up
 - OTP_INTENT_VERIFY_EMAIL: OTP for verifying email

refreshToken.title: The refresh token to validate and exchange for a new access token
Token to refresh access when expired

valid.title: returns true if the otp matches the request, else returns false
